questions.text: Which planet in our solar system rotates clockwise on its axis?
What is the name of the process by which liquid water turns into ice?
Which part of a plant is responsible for making seeds or fruit?
What is the common term for the reflection of sound waves back to the listener?
Which gas gives protection against dangerous rays from space and makes up the ozone layer?
What is the largest organ on the outside of the human body?
What type of energy does a stretched rubber band have before it is released?
Which chemical element is found in all organic life forms on Earth?
What kind of simple machine is a steering wheel or a doorknob?
Which unit is used to measure the intensity or loudness of a sound?
